title: Do Google engineers actually vibe code?
summary: Alberta Tech explores whether Google engineers adopt "vibe coding" practices compared to competitors. The video compares code generation vibes at OpenAI and Claude, then examines Google's approach across 2024-2026 timelines and Google Tech Island initiatives.
